## Zacks upgrades Taiwan Semiconductor to Strong-Buy

A Zacks Strong-Buy upgrade on TSM may drive incremental retail buying; more substantively, it signals sell-side conviction on the foundry demand cycle and provides a positive read-through to advanced-node customers including NVDA, AMD, and AAPL.

- Zacks Research raised its rating on TSM to Strong-Buy.
- Upgrade is set against the broader foundry demand backdrop per classifier context.
- No specific price target or incremental catalyst named in the headline.
- Medium classifier confidence; Zacks upgrades carry meaningful retail flow implications.
